allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit: Prime Glory PPC System with Supabase integration *)

Bash(git commit -m 'Add Vercel config for static HTML SPA routing *)

Bash(git commit -m 'Use default mock state for instant dashboard loading *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Expand DEFAULT_STATE with complete mock data *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add home dashboard with module navigation *)
Bash(gh pr create --title 'Deploy Prime Glory PPC System to Vercel' --body ' *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Restore original working prototype \(revert broken Supabase rewrite\) *)

Bash(git commit -m 'Use Prime Glory building photo as login background *)

Bash(git commit -m 'Persist app state to Supabase with realtime cross-tab/user sync *)
